# ArcanumWiki

ArcanumWiki is a human-made Dungeon Master toolkit and D&D reference archive.

## Site posture

- Public static HTML first
- No AI-generated product features
- No launch-time auth requirement
- No launch-time backend requirement
- Search generated at build time

## Key sections

- /wiki
- /guides
- /resources
- /search
- /contributors
- /about

## Preferred reading

Use the public pages, guides, and archive entries as the primary source of information about the project.
